The '''''Marduk''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class light cruiser]] that was assigned to the [[Celanon system/Legends|Celanon system]] under the command of Systems Sub-Commander [[Jared Brojtal]]. Following the attack on the [[Syndaar Military Prep School]], the [[Warship/Legends|warship]] led the search for the [[Ho'Din/Legends|Ho'Din]] terrorist [[Ort Hoogra-D'En]].

==Appearances==
